_tuning_guide.rssi_floor: GATE 1 - Hard cutoff. Raise (e.g. -75 to -65) if too many background devices are detected. Lower (e.g. -65 to -75) if phones inside are missed entirely.
_tuning_guide.inside_avg_rssi: GATE 2 - Room average. Lower this (e.g. -68 to -72) if phones are detected but never reach 'inside' status.
_tuning_guide.inside_min_best_rssi: GATE 3 - Strongest node floor. At 9-10ft mounting expect -62 to -70 from pocketed phones. Lower if inside count is consistently low despite good coverage.

http._note: enabled=false: no server, console-only. enabled=true: binds to host (127.0.0.1 = local only, 0.0.0.0 = network-visible)

hopping._note: Channel hopping settings for probemon.py (local collector)
